answers.explanation: 最短路径是：Castel Cafe -> (chirac and Castel Cafe节点) -> (chirac and bourdnail节点) -> (chirac and bourdnail节点) -> (20 Eiffel and bourdnail节点) -> 20 Eiffel，总距离约888米。
